title: Locate the Andromeda Galaxy
description: Use a planisphere star chart, a red flashlight and a basic telescope to locate our neighboring galaxy while preserving night vision.

dialogue.text: Nova here. Choose a dark, open spot away from traffic, check the forecast and let your eyes adjust for 15 minutes. Keep screens dim, secure your basic telescope and use a planisphere star chart with a red flashlight to preserve night vision. Ready?

Shield the red flashlight to avoid glare and trace Cassiopeia's W on the star chart. From the midpoint, sweep the basic telescope slowly at low magnification toward a faint smudge—that's Andromeda. Keep footing sure, mind your surroundings and never aim near the Sun or aircraft.
Nice work! Log the position for next time, cap the telescope, switch off the flashlight and pack your gear before leaving the site.
